title: A fast yellow UFO was spotted by a pilot and 11 people during a flight near Aracati-CE [1989]
excerpt: SEPT 15th, 1989. Time: 20:25. Duration: 17 minutes. A TAM pilot and 11 other people observed an unidentified flying object, in the form of a yellow light that increased and decreased in size. text_preview: SEPT 15th, 1989. Time: 20:25. Duration: 17 minutes. A TAM pilot and 11 other people observed an unidentified flying object, in the form of a yellow light that increased and decreased in size. According to the reporting pilot, “at 20 NM [nautical miles] from the aircraft”, the UFO had an “estimated size of 40cm” as if it were a “large wall clock”. The UFO was traveling at a “very high speed; unable to estimate; evolving vertically following the aircraft” from FL 080 [8,000 feet] in the South position. Still according to the pilot’s report, the unknown object was positioned “from 1-hour to 4-hou
summary: A TAM pilot and 11 others observed a fast yellow light changing size and evolving vertically near Aracati-CE for 17 minutes on September 15, 1989.
